mlir.attr-alias: #loc1 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 1 : 32 ) #loc2 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 20 ) #loc3 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 31 ) #loc4 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 43 ) #loc5 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 5 : 60 ) #loc6 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 11 : 21 ) #loc7 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 11 : 32 ) #loc8 |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 11 : 44 ) #loc |-> loc ( "adder.mlir" : 1 : 20 )
mlir.symbol-table: "Adder" |-> "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : %0 , %1 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg0 , %arg1 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "x" , "y" , .AttributeValueList ] instanceName |-> "swap" moduleName |-> @Swap parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "result1" , "result2" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) %2 , .OpResults = "comb.add" ( %0 , %0 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %2 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input a : i8 , input b : i8 , output res : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc6 , #loc7 , #loc8 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Adder" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) "Same" |-> "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %arg0 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input xx : i8 , output res : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc , #loc1 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Same" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) "Swap" |-> "hw.module" ( .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i8 , %arg1 : i8 , .ValueIdAndTypeList ) : %0 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg0 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "xx" , .AttributeValueList ] instanceName |-> "same1" moduleName |-> @Same parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "res" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %1 , .OpResults = "hw.instance" ( %arg1 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { argNames |-> [ "xx" , .AttributeValueList ] instanceName |-> "same2" moduleName |-> @Same parameters |-> [ ] resultNames |-> [ "res" , .AttributeValueList ] } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %1 , %0 , .ValueIdList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input xx : i8 , input yy : i8 , output result1 : i8 , output result2 : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc2 , #loc3 , #loc4 , #loc5 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Swap" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types )

circt.result: ListItem ( ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 6 ) ) ) )

observation.ob-out: "swap" |-> ListItem ( result ( result1 , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) ) ListItem ( result ( result2 , TV ( i8 , 2 ) ) ) "swap/same1" |-> ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 2 ) ) ) "swap/same2" |-> ListItem ( result ( res , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) )
